sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '3572002' as GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, 0 as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2, round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'Translation [yyyy-mm-dd]', SubProd = 'S20 FB', TTY = '990', Flex1 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'unassigned', Flex3 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex1 = Mapkey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= fromGL and GL <=thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey like 'M1-3-6-06-%' and len(MapKey)-len(replace(MapKey,'-','')) = 4

update TransX set Flex2 = (case when BusCat >='10' and BusCat <= '29' then 'Assumed' else (case when BusCat >='30' and BusCat <= '39' then 'Ceded' else '' end) end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = substring(CC,4,1) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'M1-3-6-06-14'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Flex1, Flex2,Flex3, Amt1, Amt2, Flex4) (select KeyID, Co, GL, Flex1,Flex2,Flex3, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, 'pass1' as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Flex1,Flex2,Flex3)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex4 is NULL or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0))
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2850500'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING' and not GL in ('1099917','2851017')
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '9005' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '9006' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '9231' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
Delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '599%' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
Update x set Rate1 = r.Rate From TransX x inner join CrcyRates r on r.Crcy = x.Crcy and r.Typ = 'S' and r.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set Rate2 = r.Rate From TransX x inner join Companies c on c.Co = x.Co inner join CrcyRates r on r.Crcy = c.Crcy and r.Typ = 'S' and r.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Amt4 = round(Amt1*Rate1/Rate2,2), Amt5 = round(Amt1*Rate1,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Amt6 = round(Amt4 - Amt2,2), Amt7 = round(Amt5 - Amt3,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Rate1,Rate2,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6,Amt7) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Rate1,Rate2,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6,Amt7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set Amt1 = 0, Amt2 = Amt6, Amt3 = Amt7 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]',PymtTerm,Descr from PymtTerms)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)

update TransX set Flex1 = Mapkey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= fromGL and GL <=thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey like 'M1-3-6-%' and len(MapKey)-len(replace(MapKey,'-','')) = 3 and Flex1 = 'unassigned'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'blank' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'M1-3-6-06-14' and Flex3 = ''
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt1-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex4 = Field1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Descr = Flex1 and (Flex2 = Field2 or Field2 = '') and (Flex3 = Field3 or Field3 = '') where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'PwC Lead Sheets' and ID = 'PL'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex2) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,'' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TP, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex6 = 'London Runoff' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2009'
update TransX set Flex6 = c.Name from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Co = '2009' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '1460000000'
